title: METİFLAM (Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center) News
content:
METİFLAM (Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center) News

METİFLAM Director Prof. Dr. Nesrin Kartal Özer was elected to the editorial staff of IUBMB Life and FEBS Open Bio, two internationally respected scientific journals.

Our university was elected as an editor of the "Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases: Pathophysiology and Treatment" organized by METİFLAM.

Our METİFLAM deputy director Dr. Assist. Prof. Dr. Tuğçe DEMİREL-YALÇINER presented the poster titled "Hepatic Seipin Deficiency Reduces Cholesterol Mediated Lipid Droplet Maturation Dependent Of Endoplasmic Reticulum Stress But Not Lipophagy" at the SFRR-E "From Molecules To Tissues: Redox Biology In Action" at the international congress.

In the same meeting, 4 poster presentations were made under the supervision of our center director Prof. Dr. Nesrin KARTAL ÖZER.

Our METIFLAM director Prof. Dr. Nesrin KARTAL ÖZER presented a Keynote lecture titled "Hepatocyte seipin silencing reduces cholesterol mediated lipid droplet maturation in fatty liver model" as an invited speaker at the "Redox Biology: A paradigm of the Foundation of Life" congress organized by the Serbian Society for Mitochondrial and Free Radical Physiology in Belgrade between 27-29 September 2024.
